evidence.reason: Link text is generic and does not explain the destination or action.

issues.suggested_fix: Use descriptive link text like "Download scholarship guidelines" instead of "click here."

rule.title: Link text is too generic
rule.why_it_matters: Students who navigate by a list of links hear 'click here' with no context and cannot tell links apart.
rule.manual_review_notes: Surrounding text may add context visually, but the link should still make sense on its own.
rule.static_check_limitations: The check only matches a small list of common generic phrases.

issues.message: Image is missing useful alt text

evidence.reason: Image is missing useful alt text.

issues.suggested_fix: Add alt text that describes the image purpose, or mark decorative images as presentation.

rule.title: Image missing useful alt text
rule.why_it_matters: Students using screen readers miss the image content entirely, which can hide instructions, diagrams, or required information.
rule.manual_review_notes: Confirm whether the image is informative or decorative; only a human can judge if existing alt text is actually useful.
rule.static_check_limitations: Static checks cannot judge alt text quality, only whether it exists.

evidence.reason: Video has no captions or subtitles track.

issues.suggested_fix: Add captions or subtitles for education video content.

rule.title: Video missing captions
rule.why_it_matters: Deaf and hard-of-hearing students cannot access spoken lesson content without captions or subtitles.
rule.manual_review_notes: Captions may be provided by an embedded player or platform instead of a track element.
rule.static_check_limitations: The check only sees <track> elements; player-level or burned-in captions are invisible to static HTML.

evidence.reason: Audio element has no visible document text containing "transcript".

issues.suggested_fix: Add a transcript near audio lessons or instructions.

rule.title: Audio missing a transcript
rule.why_it_matters: Deaf and hard-of-hearing students need a text alternative to use audio lessons or instructions.
rule.manual_review_notes: A transcript may exist on a linked page; confirm it is easy to find.
rule.static_check_limitations: The check only looks for the word "transcript" in visible page text, which is a rough heuristic.

limitations: This prototype only runs static HTML checks.
It does not replace a full human accessibility audit.
It does not yet perform browser-based interaction testing.

likely_blockers.task_impact: Link text may not clearly explain the destination or action.

likely_blockers.message: Image is missing useful alt text
likely_blockers.task_impact: Image content may be unavailable to students who need text alternatives.
Video content may be inaccessible to students who need captions.
Audio content may be inaccessible to students who need a transcript.
